title_en: Marvel's Wolverine: Deep Cuts SDCC Panel Live Report | Comic Con 2026
summary_en: Our San Diego Comic-Con 2026 live reporting kicks off with Insomniac’s panel for upcoming PlayStation 5 exclusive, Marvel’s Wolverine.
body_en:
San Diego Comic-Con 2026 is here, and IGN is at the show reporting live on all the panels that matter.
Our live reporting kicks off with Insomniac’s panel for upcoming PlayStation 5 exclusive, Marvel’s Wolverine, which begins at 11.15am PT / 2.15pm ET / 7.15pm UK time direct from Hall H. There, Insomniac Games’ creative director Marcus Smith, game director Mike Daly, narrative director Walt Williams, and senior project director Jess Reiner-Reed, alongside actors Liam McIntyre (Wolverine) and Krizia Bajos (Jean Grey), as well well as executive producer Eric Monacelli from Marvel Games, will unveil new details from the game. We expect a behind-the-scenes look into the game’s story, characters, and exclusive never-before-seen content.
Insomniac recently confirmed that you'll be able to team up with Wolverine's nemesis, Sabretooth, in the game, and the latest trailer, below, offered a first look at Lady Deathstrike . Could today's SDCC panel reveal more new characters?
You can get our live reporting below. But in the meantime, be sure to check out our big interview with Insomniac Games from June , where we found out a lot more about how Marvel’s Wolverine works and plays, including information on co-op combat with Jean Grey.
Then, on Friday, July 24 and Saturday, July 25, IGN will stream live from San Diego with A-list interviews, exclusive reveals, and live coverage of SDCC’s biggest panels and announcements. Our broadcast runs from 3pm PT / 6pm ET to 7pm PT / 10pm ET each day and streams across IGN platforms. Here's our live show schedule .
Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
